title: Cuneiform Tablet #0846: Neo-Assyrian Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
